tasks.subject: Task 1: Capability-conditional tile-count CoherenceFeasibility
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace core/range>=25 with a capability-conditional, tile-count-keyed predicate; add n_tiles to TileGeometry; rekey RelaxedCoherenceFeasibility.

**Files:** feasibility.py, test_tuning_feasibility.py, test_tuning_loop.py (one ratio case).

**Acceptance Criteria:** TileGeometry gains appended n_tiles:int=1 (positional ctor still works); SAMPLES/COVARIANCE False at n_tiles>=2 True at 1; MARGINAL_VARIANCE True iff marg_worst_case<=marg_tol N-independent; POINT True; RelaxedCoherenceFeasibility(n_star_joint=64) widens joint; KM_PER_DEG+ratio removed.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_tuning_feasibility.py tests/test_tuning_loop.py -v && pixi run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tuning/feasibility.py", "tests/test_tuning_feasibility.py", "tests/test_tuning_loop.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_tuning_feasibility.py tests/test_tuning_loop.py -v && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TileGeometry appended n_tiles=1 positional-safe", "SAMPLES/COVARIANCE False at N>=2 True at 1", "MARGINAL True iff marg_worst_case<=marg_tol N-indep", "POINT True", "RelaxedCoherenceFeasibility widens joint", "KM_PER_DEG+ratio removed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Stage-C loop wiring — hard barrier at multi-tile joint scale
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive the GMRF tuner in global multi-tile coherent mode ({SAMPLES}, TileGeometry.n_tiles=N); prove a multi-tile joint trial is excluded before any solve.

**Files:** create stage_c.py, test_stage_c_hard_barrier.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** tile_geometry_for(n_tiles, params) carries n_tiles+range; run_stage_c_loop runs tune with {SAMPLES}+TileGeometry(n_tiles); test 4: n_tiles=9 scorer never called (spy==0), n_tiles=1 scorer called.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_stage_c_hard_barrier.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tuning/stage_c.py", "tests/test_stage_c_hard_barrier.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_stage_c_hard_barrier.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tile_geometry_for carries n_tiles+range", "run_stage_c_loop uses {SAMPLES}+TileGeometry(n_tiles)", "n_tiles=9 scorer never called, n_tiles=1 called"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Worst-case-localized coherence reduction (strict-max adjacent-seam corr-err)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Strict MAX adjacent-seam corr-err reduction (never aggregate); prove an aggregate cannot stand in for it.

**Files:** create coherence_gate.py, test_stage_c_worst_case_localized.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** worst_case_corr_err = strict max (0.0 empty); corr_err_feasible = worst<=tol; median-healthy one-catastrophic-pair judged infeasible at tol=0.5.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_stage_c_worst_case_localized.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tuning/coherence_gate.py", "tests/test_stage_c_worst_case_localized.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_stage_c_worst_case_localized.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["worst_case_corr_err strict max 0.0 empty", "corr_err_feasible=worst<=tol", "median-healthy catastrophic-pair infeasible"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Both-tiers feasibility frontier consumer (tuning/tradeoff.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thin consumer baking the measured curve into a both-tiers frontier (joint worst-of-K empty region + marginal flat) with predicate-injected feasibility. No measurement here.

**Files:** create tradeoff.py, test_stage_c_tradeoff.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** MEASURED_FRONTIER rows n_tiles in {4,9,16,25,36} from design §2 + provenance; feasibility_frontier(predicate) returns both-tiers rows; default joint empty + marg ships; RelaxedCoherenceFeasibility(64) widens joint with no module change.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_stage_c_tradeoff.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tuning/tradeoff.py", "tests/test_stage_c_tradeoff.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_stage_c_tradeoff.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MEASURED_FRONTIER baked from §2 + provenance", "feasibility_frontier both tiers predicate-injected", "default joint empty marg ships; relaxed widens joint no module change"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Concrete strict-xfail + generate the frontier doc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the retired core/range strict-xfail with a concrete one (multi-tile joint feasible, xfail until deferred fix widens n_star_joint); generate the owner-facing both-tiers frontier doc.

**Files:** modify test_core_authoritative_gate.py; create docs/validation/phase5_feasibility_resolution_frontier.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** test_acceptance_multi_tile_joint_feasible ({SAMPLES} n_tiles=9 feasible, @xfail strict) XFAILs today; frontier doc both tiers + robust-first framing + non-monotone/thin-3x3 caveats + marginal ~15% conditional + provenance + no-operational-global-coherent-until-deferred-redesign statement.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/test_core_authoritative_gate.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_core_authoritative_gate.py", "docs/validation/phase5_feasibility_resolution_frontier.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_core_authoritative_gate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["concrete multi-tile-joint strict-xfail XFAILs (not xpass/error)", "frontier doc both tiers + robust-first + provenance + owner-deferred statement"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: [USER GATE] Stage-C DoD — boundary respected, quantified, relaxable, surfaced
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Close Stage C: aggregate evidence (hard barrier, worst-case-localized, relaxed-widens, concrete strict-xfail, both-tiers frontier surfaced) + full suite/typecheck/lint/pre-commit green.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** create tests/test_stage_c_dod.py; modify PROGRESS.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** aggregated Stage-C evidence passes; full suite green (pass/skip/xfail, no unexpected fail/xpass/error); typecheck+lint+pre-commit clean; PROGRESS records Stage C closed + owner-deferred fix.

**Verify:** `pixi run test -q && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_stage_c_dod.py", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["aggregated Stage-C evidence passes", "full suite+typecheck+lint+pre-commit green (xfail not xpass)", "PROGRESS records Stage C closed + owner-deferred fix"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
